ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "per_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("per_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Text of the statement */,
  "stat_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the statement (e.g., fantasy, reality) */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statement (e.g., truth, lie) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statement was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement being labeled */,
  "grd_truth" TEXT /* Ground truth label (e.g., truth, lie) */,
  "label_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the label (e.g., 0.8 for 80%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labels_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statements ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "q_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "q_num" INTEGER /* Question number */,
  "order_first" TEXT /* Order of the question (e.g., truths, lies) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., open-ended, multiple-choice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("q_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_statements" (
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant-statement association */,
  "per_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant making the statement */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "q_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_statements_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statements ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_statements_per_id FOREIGN KEY ("per_id") REFERENCES participants ("per_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_statements_q_id FOREIGN KEY ("q_id") REFERENCES questions ("q_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "resp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "ps_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant-statement association */,
  "response" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_ps_id FOREIGN KEY ("ps_id") REFERENCES participant_statements ("ps_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "dcm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dcm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "proj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "proj_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_participants" (
  "pp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-participant association */,
  "proj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "per_id" TEXT /* ID of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_per_id FOREIGN KEY ("per_id") REFERENCES participants ("per_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_participants_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "proj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "proj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., data, project, user) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rand_values" (
  "rand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each random value */,
  "rand_value" REAL /* Random value used for data collection */,
  "rand_order" INTEGER /* Order of the random value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the random value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the random value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "proj_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_proj_id FOREIGN KEY ("proj_id") REFERENCES projects ("proj_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_file_permissions" (
  "dfp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file permission */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dfp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_file_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_file_permissions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the statement (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis (e.g., 0.8 for 80%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statements ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "ent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "entity" TEXT /* Extracted entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statements ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "top_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statement */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Extracted topic */,
  "topic_type" TEXT /* Type of topic (e.g., theme, keyword) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("top_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statements ("stat_id")
)
